antipattern.description: PRs over 1000 lines ("big bang refactor", "all the changes").
antipattern.reason: Review degrades to LGTM. Real defects hide in the noise; merge incidents spike.

antipattern.description: Reviewers comment while CI is red.
antipattern.reason: Wastes attention — half the review will be invalidated by the fix. Block review on green CI.

antipattern.description: Half the review comments are formatting and naming preferences.
antipattern.reason: Automation (ruff/prettier) is one config away. Style-by-debate erodes reviewer goodwill.

antipattern.description: Human is the first reviewer; no agentic pre-pass.
antipattern.reason: Misses obvious gaps (no test added for new branch, unhandled error path). Cheap agentic pre-pass closes those before the human spends time.
Comments lose authority; future reviewers learn not to bother commenting.

antipattern.description: Approvals coming back in under 30 seconds for non-trivial PRs.
antipattern.reason: Statistically impossible to have reviewed the diff. Quality gate becomes social ritual.
